title: Food Overhaul - Vanilla Foods
description: An addon for 'Food Overhaul', that adds support for vanilla items.
body:
# Food Overhaul - Vanilla Foods

An addon for [Food Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/food-overhaul), that adds support for vanilla items.

Adds a collection of food effects, that are designed to be used with food items added by vanilla Minecraft.

Installing [Health Regeneration Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-regeneration-overhaul), [Mana Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/mana-attributes), [Overhauled Damage](https://modrinth.com/mod/overhauled-damage) and/or [Stamina Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/stamina-attributes) gives most food effects additional attributes.

Mods like [Food Effect Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/foodeffecttooltips) are recommended.
